medical_boundary: Research decision-support visualization only; not a surgical instruction.
source_summary: Borges RSTL direction principles encoded as topology-bound draft assets; original clinical figures are not redistributed.
clinical_validation_gate: Issue #2 must be completed before any asset is marked validated:true.

limitations: geometry is approximate
requires clinician line-by-line review
forehead and ear regions require manual confirmation

assets.format: triangle centroid direction samples with vector, confidence, and provenance
limitations: large direction-prior JSON is intentionally not committed
host remote_filename behind the configured asset base or generate local_cache_path with tools/build_rstl_direction_prior.py
derived from the current MediaPipe RSTL draft atlas
triangle-centroid samples are not a clinician-approved atlas
requires #2 clinical review before validated use
not the default face incision guide
requires clinician review

assets.generated_by: web 3D annotator and FLAME offline pipeline
limitations: FLAME assets are not redistributed
requires #61 workflow
requires #2 clinical review before validated use

assets.format: dev-local triangle centroid direction field generated under assets/flame/
limitations: FLAME assets and generated direction fields are not redistributed
generated output is gitignored under local_outputs/rstl_flame_direction_prior.json
nearest-neighbor MediaPipe-to-FLAME bridge is not clinical registration
requires #61 workflow
requires #2 clinical review before validated use

assets.format: dev-local triangle centroid direction field generated from a licensed local BFM/custom 3DMM mesh
limitations: BFM/custom 3DMM assets and generated direction fields are not redistributed
default generic output is gitignored under local_outputs/rstl_3dmm_direction_prior.json
nearest-neighbor MediaPipe-to-3DMM bridge is not clinical registration
requires #61 workflow
requires #2 clinical review before validated use
